### 1. [PARENT_AGE_IMPLAUSIBLE] Person 25275 / Relationship 19897

**Priority:** 1

**Relationship 19897: parent 25275 (Jane Graham (Drumcroagh)) / child 25276 (John Graham (Drumcroagh)) — age gap implausible**

Relationship 19897 (parent_child): parent Person 25275 (Jane Graham (Drumcroagh), gender=female) birth year ~1857; child Person 25276 (John Graham (Drumcroagh)) birth year ~1868; gap = 11 yrs. Violation(s): gap of 11 yrs is below minimum of 15 yrs (parent birth ~1857, child birth ~1868). Tolerance applied: ±2 yrs on each estimated year. GC12 — probable merge error if violation is not explained by census age imprecision.

*Recommended action: Verify birth year estimates. If confirmed implausible, review the underlying RecordedRelationships for a mis-assigned relationship.*
